recommendations.title: Charlotte's Web
recommendations.overview: Wilbur the pig is scared of the end of the season, because he knows that come that time, he will end up on the dinner table. He hatches a plan with Charlotte, a spider that lives in his pen, to ensure that this will never happen.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathomable powers just like the one and only Spider-Man. While wrestling with th
recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: Your Name.
recommendations.overview: High schoolers Mitsuha and Taki are complete strangers living separate lives. But one night, they suddenly switch places. Mitsuha wakes up in Taki’s body, and he in hers. This bizarre occurrence continues to happen randomly, and the two must adjust t

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But
recommendations.director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin K. Thompson

recommendations.title: Mary and Max
recommendations.overview: A tale of friendship between two unlikely pen pals: Mary, a lonely, eight-year-old girl living in the suburbs of Melbourne, and Max, a forty-four-year old, severely obese man living in New York.

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Action
recommendations.overview: A fanboy of a supervillain supergroup known as the Vicious 6, Gru hatches a plan to become evil enough to join them, with the backup of his followers, the Minions.

recommendations.title: Bambi
recommendations.overview: Bambi's tale unfolds from season to season as the young prince of the forest learns about life, love, and friends.

recommendations.title: The Garden of Words
recommendations.overview: Takao, who is training to become a shoemaker, skipped school and is sketching shoes in a Japanese-style garden. He meets a mysterious woman, Yukino, who is older than him. Then, without arranging the times, the two start to see each other again and a

recommendations.title: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Spider-Ham: Caught in a Ham follows Spider-Ham as he faces off against bad guys, chows down on hot dogs, and makes plenty of food-based puns.
